name: Olivier Neervoort
label: Last week · beyond the numbers
text:
Re: People
The people team is spending a lot of time on hiring at the moment. In the past month (15/5 - 15/6) we've had 10 hires. Focus is really on hiring people in Operational roles. Referrals are very welcome!!! Specifically for In office Accountmanagers and Installers throughout the country.

Also, last week we opened 3 vacancies:
- Installation Success Manager
- Medior Work Prep Specialist
- AI Native builder
